prompt:
Goal: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic vertical portrait of a trendy young female influencer sitting confidently on a giant glowing yellow cube featuring a large white Snapchat ghost logo on the front.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 composition, full-body fashion portrait, low camera angle, glossy black reflective floor, dark futuristic studio filled with yellow neon haze and volumetric light. The subject is centered, seated with one knee raised, legs relaxed, looking toward the viewer, holding a smartphone in one hand.

Subject details: The woman has long flowing wavy dark hair, soft glam makeup, a playful luxury streetwear influencer vibe, and an intentionally blurred/obscured face for anonymity. She wears a black crop top, oversized shiny yellow-and-black jacket slipping off one shoulder, loose black cargo pants with straps, and yellow-black high-top sneakers. Add small jewelry such as a delicate necklace. Make the shoes and jacket visually prominent with crisp fabric texture, sneaker details, and glossy highlights.

Main object: The cube is bright Snapchat yellow with rounded corners, glowing edges, and a large centered white ghost logo outlined in black on its front face. The cube casts yellow light upward onto the subject and downward onto the wet reflective floor.

Background interface elements: Surround the subject with exactly 12 glowing Snapchat-themed AR hologram elements in yellow and white neon: 1) top-left small circular menu icon, 2) left panel reading “Snap Streak 365 🔥”, 3) left-center outlined camera icon, 4) left-middle speech bubble reading “You’re my streak partner”, 5) lower-left smiley face icon, 6) upper-center “100” icon, 7) center-left triangular play icon, 8) upper-right large square Snapcode-style panel with a white ghost, 9) small smiley icon below the upper-right area, 10) right panel reading “Send a Chat”, 11) right notification card reading “New Snap from Alex 300”, 12) right friends card titled “Besties” with three tiny avatar rows labeled Maya, Todd, and Zoe with streak numbers and fire emojis. Add an extra neon “100” mark near the lower right as part of the ambient background glow, but keep the 12 main UI elements clear and readable.

Lighting and style: Hyper-realistic cinematic photography, luxury social-media aesthetic, high contrast black-and-yellow palette, cyberpunk Snapchat atmosphere, rim lighting around hair and jacket, glowing dust particles, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed textures, reflective wet floor, dramatic neon bloom, crisp subject and cube.

Text customization: Use Snapchat visual language, with yellow as the dominant glow and 365 in the Snap Streak panel.

Constraints: Do not add extra people. Keep the ghost logo large and recognizable on the cube. Avoid watermarks, signatures, distorted hands, unreadable main text, or excessive clutter over the subject.
